name: @umbraculum/i18n
description: Generic locale-bundle framework (TypeScript types + JSON bundles + copy-json build step). Platform scope: the bundle MACHINERY is platform-neutral; the current bundle CONTENT (en.json / it.json) is brewery-flavored. Per sub-plan #9 plan doc §1.4, content split (extracting brewery-vertical strings into a separate brewery-locales package) is deferred to a future sub-plan. Renamed from @brewery/i18n to @umbraculum/i18n as sub-plan #9 slot 7 (2026-05-19).

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --out-dir dist --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-json.mjs
